Package org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.redis

@NullMarked package org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.redis
Provides the API for embedding observations.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.springframework.ai.vectorstore
    Provides interfaces and implementations for working with vector databases in Spring AI.
    org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.redis.autoconfigure
    Auto-configuration for Redis Vector Store.
  • Class
    Description
    RedisFilterExpressionConverter
    Converts Filter.Expression into Redis search filter expression format
    RedisVectorStore
    Redis-based vector store implementation using Redis Stack with Redis Query Engine and RedisJSON.
    RedisVectorStore.Algorithm
     
    RedisVectorStore.Builder
     
    RedisVectorStore.DistanceMetric
    Supported distance metrics for vector similarity in Redis.
    RedisVectorStore.MetadataField
     
    RedisVectorStore.TextScorer
    Text scoring algorithms for text search in Redis.
